steps.title: Balance light and moisture
steps.content: Desert moss needs sunlight for photosynthesis, but too much direct light can dry it out. Semitransparent quartz would reduce light intensity without blocking light entirely.

steps.title: Use the growth comparison
steps.content: The 62% longer shoot tissue shows moss under quartz grew better, so the rocks likely helped it retain moisture. A adds an unsupported comparison, B contradicts the growth finding, and D adds an unsupported thickness condition. The answer is C.
